Craft

Mayo Crafts

Locally made handcrafted goods from County Mayo

📍 Cashel Market📍 Keel Market

About Mayo Crafts

Mayo Crafts brings the best of County Mayo's craft tradition to Achill Island Market. This stall features a rotating selection of locally made handcrafted items — each one made with passion and pride by makers from across the county.

From decorative home items to practical handmade goods, Mayo Crafts represents the vibrant craft community that thrives in the West of Ireland. The stall is a celebration of what happens when skilled hands and creative minds come together.

If you're looking for something authentically Irish, handmade and local, Mayo Crafts is a must-visit at the market. Every item tells a story of the maker behind it.

What You'll Find

🏠 Home Décor

Handcrafted decorative items for the home — unique pieces from Mayo makers.

🎁 Gift Items

Thoughtful handmade gifts — perfect souvenirs from the Wild Atlantic Way.

✂️ Traditional Craft

Items made using traditional Irish craft techniques passed down through generations.

🌍 Local & Irish

Everything is made in County Mayo — supporting local makers and small businesses.
